title: 🦞 Best Platform for Using OpenClaw Bot? (Telegram/Discord/Slack ...
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

From a developer’s perspective, which platform works best for interacting with the OpenClaw bot — **Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp, or Slack**? Integrating the OpenClaw bot into your daily workflow can significantly enhance your productivity. When it comes to choosing the best platform for this integration, Redditors have shared their experiences and recommendations across various platforms like Telegram, Discord, Slack, and WhatsApp. Here’s a succinct guide to help you make an informed decision:. "For dev workflows, Discord is honestly the best option if you need clean markdown and code blocks.". **Pros**: Reliable for work, threads keep contexts clean, good support for code blocks and tables. **Markdown/Code Output**: Discord and Slack excel in providing clean markdown and code block support. **Automation/Webhooks**: All platforms support webhooks, but Discord and Slack are often preferred for their ease of integration. By considering these insights from the Reddit community, you can choose the best platform for integrating your OpenClaw bot and optimize your workflow.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw Cron Jobs: 8 Automation Templates, Schedules, and ...
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# OpenClaw cron jobs: automate your AI agent while you sleep. * OpenClaw (previously known as Clawdbot and Moltbot) has built-in cron jobs that let your agent run tasks on a schedule without you being present. * What are OpenClaw cron jobs. ## What are OpenClaw cron jobs. Cron jobs are scheduled tasks that your OpenClaw agent executes automatically. An agent with cron jobs runs scheduled tasks at 7 AM, backs up files every hour, and sends weekly reports without manual triggering. Just tell your agent what you want scheduled and it will create the cron job for you. > "Create a cron job that runs every morning at 7 AM UTC. When a cron job runs in the main session, it has access to the full conversation history. For a complete walkthrough of building a morning briefing cron job, see OpenClaw Morning Briefing: 10-Minute Setup That Actually Works. Q: How many cron jobs can I run? * OpenClaw documentation on cron jobs.

content:

# Cron Jobs. # ​ Cron jobs (Gateway scheduler). openclaw cron run <job-id>. openclaw cron runs --id <job-id>`. ## ​ Tool-call equivalents (Gateway cron tool). ## ​ Where cron jobs are stored. ## ​ Concepts. ### ​ Jobs. ### ​ Schedules. #### ​ Main session jobs (system events). #### ​ Isolated jobs (dedicated cron sessions). ### ​ Payload shapes (what runs). #### ​ Webhook delivery flow. ### ​ cron.add params. ### ​ cron.update params. ### ​ cron.run and cron.remove params. `~/.openclaw/cron/runs/<jobId>.jsonl`. ## ​ Retry policy. ## ​ Configuration. store: "~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json",. ## ​ Maintenance. ### ​ Defaults. ### ​ How it works. openclaw cron add --name "Ops sweep" --cron "0 6 * * *" --session isolated --message "Check ops queue" --agent ops. openclaw cron edit <jobId> --agent ops. openclaw cron edit <jobId> --clear-agent`. openclaw cron run <jobId> --due`. `openclaw cron runs --id <jobId>`. `openclaw cron runs --id <jobId> --limit 50`. ## ​ Troubleshooting. ### ​ A recurring job keeps delaying after failures.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw cron scheduler guide for proactive automations
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

Cron is for tasks that need a precise schedule or tasks you want to keep out of your main conversation history. Heartbeat handles the recurring background checks and cron handles “at a specific time” and “run this job in isolation.”. OpenClaw keeps cron job definitions on disk and it keeps per-run history separately. OpenClaw cron supports three scheduling patterns and you pick based on the job you’re building. A main session cron job drops a system event into your main session then the agent processes it with full context. A cron job can run and do nothing visible or it can deliver output to a channel. ## Creating cron jobs via chat. The agent can convert that into a cron schedule plus an isolated message payload plus delivery targeting. Create an isolated cron job with a cron expression like `0 7 * * *` and set announce delivery to your preferred channel and target. ### Why did my cron job not run?

title: 🦞 cron - OpenClaw
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

Tip: run `openclaw cron --help` for the full command surface. Note: isolated `cron add` jobs default to `--announce` delivery. Note: `openclaw cron run` now returns as soon as the manual run is queued for execution. Upgrade note: if you have older cron jobs from before the current delivery/store format, run `openclaw doctor --fix`. openclaw cron edit <job-id> --announce --channel telegram --to "123456789" openclaw  cron  edit <job-i d> --announce --channel  telegram --to  "123456789". openclaw cron edit <job-id> --no-deliver openclaw  cron  edit <job-i d> --no-deliver. openclaw cron edit <job-id> --light-context openclaw  cron  edit <job-i d> --light-context. openclaw cron edit <job-id> --announce --channel slack --to "channel:C1234567890" openclaw  cron  edit <job-i d> --announce --channel  slack --to "channel:C1234567890". openclaw cron add \ openclaw  cron  add  \ --name "Lightweight morning brief" \ --name  "Lightweight morning brief"  \ --cron "0 7 * * *" \ --cron "0 7 * * *"  \ --session isolated \ --session  isolated  \ --message "Summarize overnight updates." \ --message "Summarize overnight updates."  \ --light-context \ --light-context  \ --no-deliver --no-deliver.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw: cron-scheduling - LobeHub
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

This Skill provides practical guidance to schedule and manage recurring and one-off tasks on Unix-like systems using cron and systemd timers. It explains cron syntax and common schedule patterns, crontab management commands (crontab -e, -l, -r, user crontabs), and shorthand strings like @daily and @reboot. Use it for automated backups, reports, cleanup, deployment hooks, cron-to-systemd migrations, and debugging why jobs didn’t run — improving reliability, observability, and maintainability of scheduled work. Covers cron syntax, crontab management, systemd timers, one-off scheduling, timezone handling, monitoring, and common failure patterns. `@reboot /path/to/script.sh # Run once at startup. 0 2 * * * /opt/scripts/backup.sh >> /var/log/backup.log 2>&1. ExecStart=/opt/scripts/backup.sh. # Set timezone for a specific cron job. ### Why didn't my cron job run? # cron-wrapper.sh — Run a command with logging, timing, and error alerting. # Usage: cron-wrapper.sh <job-name> <command> [args...]. Usage: cron-wrapper.sh <job-name> <command> [args...]}". LOG_DIR="/var/log/cron-jobs". 0 2 * * * /opt/scripts/cron-wrapper.sh daily-backup /opt/scripts/backup.sh. */5 * * * * /opt/scripts/cron-wrapper.sh health-check /opt/scripts/healthcheck.sh`.
